error_signature: cV^X value at index 0 contains invalid url
title: Invalid URL for Notion 'File & media' property
symptom: When trying to update a Notion database page with a file URL, n8n throws an error indicating the URL is invalid. The error message states that a file with type external cannot contain a Notion hosted file URL.
applies_when: Updating a database page with a file URL
not_this_if: Using a valid external file URL
Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: Notion has changed their API validation rules, disallowing the use of Notion-hosted URLs as external files. The n8n Notion node currently only supports external URLs, which leads to this validation error when attempting to use a Notion-hosted file URL.
fix_steps: Download the file from the Notion CDN to your local or server storage.
Upload the file to an external storage service (e.g., S3, Cloudflare R2).
Use the stable URL from the external storage to update the Notion database page.
agent_instruction: Re-host the file on an external storage service and use the new URL in the Notion node.
